content: Go to the Therapy screen, select a therapist and patient, then click Start.
title: How do I start a new Therapy Session?

content: The recommended water temperature is between 35°C and 38°C.
title: What is the recommended temperature range?
How do I view previous therapy sessions?
content: You can View previous therapy sessions from Therapy Log section.

title: How does the application connect to the therapy machine?
content: In the Tab need to create following hot spot with specified SSID and Password

title: How do the physical buttons on the machine work?
Where is my customer and therapy data stored?
Before Therapy
content:
• Ensure the water temperature is set correctly
  • Check all connections are secure
  • Verify customer information is entered correctly
  • Ensure system shows 'Ready' status

title: During Therapy
content:
• Monitor water temperature continuously
  • Observe customer comfort level
  • Maintain proper water flow rate
  • Keep session within recommended duration

title: After Therapy
content:
• Complete the session properly
  • Save therapy logs
  • Clean and sanitize equipment
  • Schedule follow-up if needed

title: Need More Help?
content:
If you need additional assistance, please contact our support team

  • Email: enteryouremail@provider.com
  • Phone: +91 XXXXXXXXXX
  • Timing: 24/7

title: App Cannot Connect to Device
content:
If the app fails to connect, please check the following

  • Ensure your tablet or computer is connected to the same Wi-Fi network as the therapy machine.
  • Try restarting both the therapy machine and this application
  • Check the connection status indicator in the app's header for more details.

title: Data Not Updating
content:
If the therapy data (eg, temperature, pressure) is not updating on the screen Verify the Wi-Fi connection is stable.

The therapy session might be paused. Check the status and resume if necessary. A simple page refresh can often re-establish the data stream
